load_branding_images.doc: Load global logos and application icon

apply_theme.doc: Apply the current theme to the application

toggle_theme.doc: Toggle between light and dark themes

save.doc: Save cache to file with size limit.

_parse.doc: Parse HTML/XML file into DOM tree.

query_one.doc: Execute XPath query and get first result.

get_text.doc: Extract all text content from element.

get_clean_text.doc: Extract text but avoid slurping entire content if tags are unclosed.

get_title_text.doc: Specifically extract title text, ignoring nested figures/tables.

find_in_element.doc: Find elements within a specific element.

find_children_with_attr.doc: Find children with specific attribute value.

_extract_category.doc: Extract items for a specific category.

_extract_label.doc: Extract label text from element using DOM queries.

_extract_chapter_data.doc: Extract data from a single chapter element.

parse.doc: Extract client and file ID from config file.

track_performance.doc: Decorator to log function start/end times and save to file.

DOMParser.doc: Parse HTML/XML using LXML DOM and XPath queries.

build_doc_blocks.doc: Build HTML blocks for each document.

get_domain_url.doc: Get URL for a specific domain

get_excluded_files.doc: Get list of files to exclude from archiving

cleanup_existing_archives.doc:
Remove existing archive files from the folder
Returns number of files deleted

rename_files_and_create_archive.doc:
Rename all files in folder and create zip archive
Excludes files matching patterns in exclude_patterns
Optionally cleans up existing archives first

rename_files_and_create_archive_preserve.doc: Create archive preserving the original folder structure

get_folder_summary.doc: Get summary of files in folder (excluding backups and archives)

get_existing_archives.doc: Get list of existing archive files in folder

extract_base_identifier.doc: Extract base identifier from XML content

generate_file_id.doc: Generate file ID based on pattern

update_contributor_info.doc:
Update multiple contributors' information in XML
contributor_data: { 'role_name': { 'firstname': '...', ... }, ... }

_create_new_contributor.doc: Create a new contributor element with a specific role following the sample structure

_update_existing_contributor.doc: Update existing contributor element based on sample structure

update_identifiers.doc: Update identifier and file-id elements in XML

update_visual_editor_settings.doc: Update visual editor settings in XML

get_display_value.doc: Convert raw value to display value, showing ⊘ empty for empty/None strings

_journal_signatures_by_category.doc: Build separate signatures for Reference categories, Figure/Table, and Part Label

unify_cite_sig_parts.doc: Merge dircite/indircite signature parts into 'cite' if they have identical values

_build_category_patterns.doc: Build patterns from signatures with given prefix
